---
title: "cc_2026_day10"
author: "Lyndsay Miles"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
30 Day Chart Challenge 2026 Day 9: Pop Culture

https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/sarahvitvitskiy/great-british-bake-off-results-seasons-1-14
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
s1 <- read.csv("data/Season_1.csv")
s2 <- read.csv("data/Season_2.csv")
s3 <- read.csv("data/Season_3.csv")
s4 <- read.csv("data/Season_4.csv")
s5 <- read.csv("data/Season_5.csv")
s6 <- read.csv("data/Season_6.csv")
s7 <- read.csv("data/Season_7.csv")
s8 <- read.csv("data/Season_8.csv")
s9 <- read.csv("data/Season_9.csv")
s10 <- read.csv("data/Season_10.csv")
s11 <- read.csv("data/Season_11.csv")
s12 <- read.csv("data/Season_12.csv")
s13 <- read.csv("data/Season_13.csv")
s14 <- read.csv("data/Season_14.csv")

```
Day 10 #30DayChartChallenge : Pop Culture
"Do bakers who perform well in technicals make it to the final?"
```{r}
df14 <- s14 %>% select(Baker, Round_1_Technical, Round_1, Round_2_Technical, Round_2, Round_3_Technical, Round_3, Round_4_Technical, Round_4, Round_5_Technical, Round_5, Round_6_Technical, Round_6, Round_7_Technical, Round_7, Round_8_Technical, Round_8, Round_9_Technical, Round_9, Round_10_Technical, Round_10, Technicals, Star_Bakers) %>% 
  mutate(series = "14")

df13 <- s13 %>% select(Baker, Round_1_Technical, Round_1, Round_2_Technical, Round_2, Round_3_Technical, Round_3, Round_4_Technical, Round_4, Round_5_Technical, Round_5, Round_6_Technical, Round_6, Round_7_Technical, Round_7, Round_8_Technical, Round_8, Round_9_Technical, Round_9, Round_10_Technical, Round_10, Technicals, Star_Bakers) %>% 
  mutate(series = "13")

df12 <- s12 %>% select(Baker, Round_1_Technical, Round_1, Round_2_Technical, Round_2, Round_3_Technical, Round_3, Round_4_Technical, Round_4, Round_5_Technical, Round_5, Round_6_Technical, Round_6, Round_7_Technical, Round_7, Round_8_Technical, Round_8, Round_9_Technical, Round_9, Round_10_Technical, Round_10, Technicals, Star_Bakers) %>% 
  mutate(series = "12")

df11 <- s11 %>% select(Baker, Round_1_Technical, Round_1, Round_2_Technical, Round_2, Round_3_Technical, Round_3, Round_4_Technical, Round_4, Round_5_Technical, Round_5, Round_6_Technical, Round_6, Round_7_Technical, Round_7, Round_8_Technical, Round_8, Round_9_Technical, Round_9, Round_10_Technical, Round_10, Technicals, Star_Bakers) %>% 
  mutate(series = "11")

df10 <- s10 %>% select(Baker, Round_1_Technical, Round_1, Round_2_Technical, Round_2, Round_3_Technical, Round_3, Round_4_Technical, Round_4, Round_5_Technical, Round_5, Round_6_Technical, Round_6, Round_7_Technical, Round_7, Round_8_Technical, Round_8, Round_9_Technical, Round_9, Round_10_Technical, Round_10, Technicals, Star_Bakers) %>% 
  mutate(series = "10")

df9 <- s9 %>% select(Baker, Round_1_Technical, Round_1, Round_2_Technical, Round_2, Round_3_Technical, Round_3, Round_4_Technical, Round_4, Round_5_Technical, Round_5, Round_6_Technical, Round_6, Round_7_Technical, Round_7, Round_8_Technical, Round_8, Round_9_Technical, Round_9, Round_10_Technical, Round_10, Technicals, Star_Bakers) %>%
  mutate(series = "9")

df8 <- s8 %>% select(Baker, Round_1_Technical, Round_1, Round_2_Technical, Round_2, Round_3_Technical, Round_3, Round_4_Technical, Round_4, Round_5_Technical, Round_5, Round_6_Technical, Round_6, Round_7_Technical, Round_7, Round_8_Technical, Round_8, Round_9_Technical, Round_9, Round_10_Technical, Round_10, Technicals, Star_Bakers) %>%
  mutate(series = "8")

df7 <- s7 %>% select(Baker, Round_1_Technical, Round_1, Round_2_Technical, Round_2, Round_3_Technical, Round_3, Round_4_Technical, Round_4, Round_5_Technical, Round_5, Round_6_Technical, Round_6, Round_7_Technical, Round_7, Round_8_Technical, Round_8, Round_9_Technical, Round_9, Round_10_Technical, Round_10, Technicals, Star_Bakers) %>% 
  mutate(Round_1_Technical = as.integer(str_remove_all(Round_1_Technical, "[^0-9]"))) %>%
  mutate(series = "7")

df6 <- s6 %>% select(Baker, Round_1_Technical, Round_1, Round_2_Technical, Round_2, Round_3_Technical, Round_3, Round_4_Technical, Round_4, Round_5_Technical, Round_5, Round_6_Technical, Round_6, Round_7_Technical, Round_7, Round_8_Technical, Round_8, Round_9_Technical, Round_9, Round_10_Technical, Round_10, Technicals, Star_Bakers) %>%
  mutate(series = "6")

df5 <- s5 %>% select(Baker, Round_1_Technical, Round_1, Round_2_Technical, Round_2, Round_3_Technical, Round_3, Round_4_Technical, Round_4, Round_5_Technical, Round_5, Round_6_Technical, Round_6, Round_7_Technical, Round_7, Round_8_Technical, Round_8, Round_9_Technical, Round_9, Round_10_Technical, Round_10, Technicals, Star_Bakers) %>%
  mutate(series = "5")

df <- bind_rows(df5, df6, df7, df8, df9, df10, df11, df12, df13, df14) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~str_remove_all(., "[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]")))

write.csv(df, "data/gbbo_data.csv")
```

```{r}
gbbo <- df
# Identify finalists
gbbo_long <- gbbo %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("Round_\\d+_Technical"),
    names_to = "round",
    values_to = "technical_rank"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(technical_rank)) %>%
  mutate(
    star_baker_group = if_else(Star_Bakers > 0, "Won Star Baker ≥ Once", "Never Won Star Baker"),
    finalist = if_else(grepl("WINNER|Runnerup", Round_10), "Finalist",
               if_else(grepl("WINNER|Runnerup", Round_9), "Finalist", "Eliminated"))
  )
# Check group sizes
gbbo_long %>% count(star_baker_group, finalist)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)

windowsFonts(georgia = windowsFont("Georgia"))

# Create a 5x6 grid of 30 bakers
pictogram_data <- tibble(
  x = rep(1:6, times = 5),
  y = rep(5:1, each = 6),
  group = c(rep("Won Star Baker", 29), "Never Won Star Baker")
)

ggplot(pictogram_data, aes(x = x, y = y, color = group)) +
  geom_text(label = "🧁", size = 10, family = "EmojiOne") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.1)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Won Star Baker" = "#7B4F2E",
    "Never Won Star Baker" = "#E63946"
  ),
  breaks = c("Won Star Baker", "Never Won Star Baker"),
  labels = c("Won Star Baker", "Never Won Star Baker")) +
  labs(
    title = "To Get That Cake Plate, You Have to Win Star Baker",
    subtitle = "Each cupcake = 1 Finalist in Great British Bake Off, Series 5–14",
    caption = "Data: Kaggle GBBO | #30DayChartChallenge Day 10\nCreated by: Lyndsay Miles",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(family = "georgia", hjust = 0.5, size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```
